door_push_map.intent: Player pushes a door from left side and door springs back toward closed state
assertions: door angle magnitude increases while pushing
door angle trends toward zero after releasing movement

block_push_map.intent: Player pushes a block in a lane with blockers
assertions: block cannot overlap wall or second block

occlusion_map.intent: Nearest blocker occludes hitscan before target
assertions: after moving block and opening door, next blocker determines tracer endpoint

smoke_default_map.intent: Baseline map boot and update smoke
